summary_html: Urolithin A is a gut-produced compound that triggers mitophagy, the cellular cleanup of damaged mitochondria. Learn what it is, why production declines after 40, and what the clinical research shows.
seo_title: Urolithin A After 40: Mitochondria Benefits and Research | Happy Aging
seo_description: What urolithin A is, why it matters after 40, and what clinical trials show about mitophagy, muscle health, and cellular energy for women.
